nodes.title: MUSE COLLECTIVE - Note - START HERE
widgets_values:
# MODELS AND NODES USED IN THIS WORKFLOW

---

### Put all models in the models folder, organised into their respective subfolders.
### If a required folder doesn't exist, create it.

---

## 🟣 LTX 2.3 Diffusion Model
Download **ltx-2.3-22b-distilled_transformer_only_fp8_input_scaled.safetensors** from [HERE](https://huggingface.co/Lightricks/LTX-Video/resolve/main/ltx-2.3-22b-distilled_transformer_only_fp8_input_scaled.safetensors)

📁 **Place in:** `ComfyUI/models/diffusion_models`

---

## 🟣 Audio VAE
Download **ltx-2.3-22b-distilled_audio_vae.safetensors** from [HERE](https://huggingface.co/Lightricks/LTX-Video/resolve/main/ltx-2.3-22b-distilled_audio_vae.safetensors)

📁 **Place in:** `ComfyUI/models/vae`

---

## 🟣 Video VAE
Download **ltx-2.3-22b-distilled_video_vae.safetensors** from [HERE](https://huggingface.co/Lightricks/LTX-Video/resolve/main/ltx-2.3-22b-distilled_video_vae.safetensors)

📁 **Place in:** `ComfyUI/models/vae`

---

## 🟣 Text Encoder (CLIP)
Download **gemma_3_12B_it_fp4_mixed.safetensors** from [HERE](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/ltx-2/resolve/main/split_files/text_encoders/gemma_3_12B_it_fp4_mixed.safetensors)

📁 **Place in:** `ComfyUI/models/text_encoders`

---

## 🟣 Spatial Upscaler
Download **ltx-2.3-spatial-upscaler-x2-1.1.safetensors** from [HERE](https://huggingface.co/Lightricks/LTX-Video/resolve/main/ltx-2.3-spatial-upscaler-x2-1.1.safetensors)

📁 **Place in:** `ComfyUI/models/latent_upscale_models`

---

## 🧩 Required ComfyUI Nodes

- **Muse Collective LTX Timeline** — search in Manager → Install Custom Nodes
- **ComfyUI-VideoHelperSuite** — search in Manager → Install Custom Nodes

---

## 🟣 Talking Head LoRA (required for Lipsync)
Download **LTX-2.3-22b-AV-LoRA-talking-head-v1.safetensors** from [HERE](https://huggingface.co/Lightricks/LTX-Video/resolve/main/LTX-2.3-22b-AV-LoRA-talking-head-v1.safetensors)

📁 **Place in:** `ComfyUI/models/loras/LTX2.3`
